## Checklist
<!-- Please tick the following boxes to ensure your PR is ready to be reviewed. -->

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines.
- [ ] The app is linked directly to the **official Apple App Store** (no third-party links).
- [ ] The app is placed in the most appropriate category.
- [ ] The app is placed in **alphabetical order** within its category.
- [ ] I have used the standard format: `- [App Name](link) - Description *(Pricing)*`.
- [ ] The app is free to use (completely free, ad-supported, or freemium).
